composite_description: BEAR cycle with normal conditions -- nothing to do
brief:
Bitcoin trades below its 200-day moving average in a confirmed macro downtrend, classifying this as a BEAR cycle. Market conditions remain normal—no extremes in positioning or volatility. The composite signal is NO_ACTION: a routine bearish regime with no tactical dislocations to exploit.

Both ETH and SOL show institutional risk-off positioning (z-scores near -1.0 to -1.4 vs BTC), consistent with a deflationary cycle where capital rotates to larger caps. Fear and Greed at 23 reflects subdued sentiment. With no extreme funding signals and modest 5-day drawdowns, this is textbook bear consolidation rather than capitulation or setup.
